name: Project Alpha
description: A full-stack web application for managing team workflows. Built with a REST API backend and a responsive frontend.

name: CLI Tool Kit
description: A collection of productivity command-line tools written in Python. Includes file organizers, network utilities, and automation scripts.

name: DevDash
description: A personal developer dashboard aggregating GitHub stats, open PRs, and task tracking in a single dark-themed interface.

name: Static Site Generator
description: A minimal static site generator built in PHP that converts Markdown files to HTML. Powers this very website's blog.

name: Open Source Contribution
description: Added multi-language support and performance improvements to a popular open-source library used by thousands of developers.

name: API Gateway
description: A lightweight PHP-based API gateway providing rate limiting, caching, and request routing for microservices.
